name: set_delay_model
short_description: Sets the interconnect delay model for timing analysis.
full_help:
set_delay_model

Description: 
Sets the interconnect delay model for timing analysis.

Syntax: 
set_delay_model  [-interconnect <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name             Description
  ----------------------------
  [-interconnect]  Interconnect delay model used for timing analysis: Values:
                   estimated, actual(default), none
  [-quiet]         Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]       Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Timing

arguments.description: Interconnect delay model used for timing analysis: Values: estimated, actual(default), none
Suspend message limits during command execution
